pr.title: Non-record: 1.8184 BPB Single-step Recurrent Transformer with Q-LoRA (Windows 3090)

output.summary: Documented journey to a single-pass wide transformer with near-full-rank dual-Q attention and throughput-focused tuning on Windows RTX 3090.
techniques: Single-pass transformer with GQA and dual-Q adapter derived from high-rank LoRA
Throughput-first tuning (steps=1, dim=1024) with best-checkpoint saving under 10-minute cap
Dynamic gradient scaling plus loss filtering to stabilize short-wallclock runs
